description: John Zenon, an HVAC maintenance technician, has presented to the occupational health clinic with high fever, productive cough, and severe myalgia. Environmental sampling of the factory cooling tower he recently cleaned returned positive for Legionella pneumophila. As the occupational health clinician, document the clinical encounter in GNU Health (Login: admin / gnusolidario). Record the occupational Legionnaires' disease diagnosis (ICD-10: A48.1) and a clinical evaluation documenting his high fever. The documentation must include at least two diagnostic laboratory tests, a prescription for a targeted antibiotic (Azithromycin, Levofloxacin, or Ciprofloxacin), and a respiratory follow-up appointment scheduled for 3 to 7 days from today.
